rubric_criteria.name: Novelty verified by web search (no existing paper covers specific claim)
[GROUNDED] claims individually verified against cited source
Test protocol specified (cell system, assay, controls)
No citation hallucination (cited papers exist and say what is claimed)

hypotheses_assessments.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Size Supralinearly Encodes ECM Stiffness
hypotheses_assessments.confidence_rationale: Groundedness improved by iScience 2024 (PMID 38784009) confirming endogenous YAP condensates with TEAD1+BRD4 in response to actin cytoskeletal tension; Mol Cell 2025 confirming endogenous YAP/TAZ partitioning in TEAD condensates
hypotheses_assessments.named_mechanism: ECM stiffness → YAP nuclear concentration (proportional to stiffness^0.5–1.0) → BRD4-YAP condensate volume (proportional to [YAP]^n, n=2–4 cooperative LLPS) → transcriptional output at mechanoenhancers (proportional to stiffness^1.0–3.0). Quantitative threshold: ~8–15 kPa. Specific proteins: YAP1, BRD4, MED1, EP300.
hypotheses_assessments.primary_prediction: smFISH output for CTGF/CYR61 on 5-point stiffness gradient (1, 5, 10, 20, 50 kPa) fits a power law model (output ∝ stiffness^n, n>1.5) significantly better than a linear model by F-test (p<0.05); IDR-deleted YAP linearizes this curve
hypotheses_assessments.novelty_evidence: No paper measures YAP-BRD4 condensate size as function of ECM stiffness gradient or tests supralinear/cooperative stiffness-transcription encoding. Zanconato 2018 (cancer context, no stiffness gradient); iScience 2024 PMID 38784009 (actin tension, not stiffness gradient dose-response); PMID 27990121 (co-targeting, no condensate biology).

grounded_claims_verified.claim: Endogenous YAP condensates with BRD4 in response to actin tension
YAP nuclear fraction stiffness-dependent (~4x from 1→50 kPa)
grounded_claims_verified.source: Dupont et al. 2011 Nature + multiple reviews

grounded_claims_verified.claim: Hill coefficient n=2–4 for condensate cooperativity

test_protocol.structural_assay: STORM for BRD4 condensate volume at CYR61 locus

hypotheses_assessments.critique_integration: IDR-deleted YAP mutant added as primary condensate-cooperativity discriminant; condensate formation prerequisite step added; nuclear import saturation alternative acknowledged; condensate detection in fibroblast/hydrogel system listed as prerequisite

hypotheses_assessments.title: MRTF-A Occupies CaRG-Box Mechanoenhancers on Stiff ECM
hypotheses_assessments.confidence_rationale: H3K27ac signal at MYH9 mechanoenhancer (CaRG-box containing) increased with cell adherence is consistent with Cosgrove 2025 data — partially supports prediction before formal MRTF-A CUT&RUN is performed
hypotheses_assessments.named_mechanism: Stiff ECM → F-actin polymerization → G-actin depletion → MRTF-A RPEL domain released → MRTF-A nuclear → MRTF-A occupies CaRG-box-containing mechanoenhancers (from Cosgrove 2025 catalog) → MRTF-A recruits EP300 (STRING 0.710) → H3K27ac deposited at CaRG-box mechanoenhancers → enhancer-driven transcription of cytoskeletal genes
hypotheses_assessments.primary_prediction: MRTF-A CUT&RUN on stiff ECM (50 kPa) shows enrichment at CaRG-box-containing mechanoenhancers from Cosgrove 2025 catalog; MRTF-A siRNA reduces H3K27ac at CaRG-box mechanoenhancers but NOT at TEAD-motif mechanoenhancers
hypotheses_assessments.novelty_evidence: No paper combines MRTF-A ChIP-seq/CUT&RUN + ECM stiffness gradient + mechanoenhancer-specific H3K27ac analysis. MKL1/2 ChIP-seq exists only in macrophage NF-κB context (different cell type, mark, context). The intersection MRTF-A × mechanoenhancer-specific H3K27ac × ECM stiffness is genuinely unstudied.

grounded_claims_verified.source: Miralles et al. 2003 Cell; multiple reviews

grounded_claims_verified.claim: SRF/CaRG-box motifs enriched at stiff-ECM mechanoenhancers
Functional SRF/CaRG-box in MYH9 intron 3 mechanoenhancer
MRTF-A preferentially occupies enhancers over promoters

test_protocol.annotation: Promoter (H3K4me3, <1 kb from TSS) vs enhancer (H3K4me1, >1 kb from TSS); intersect with Cosgrove 2025 mechanoenhancer catalog
test_protocol.knockdown_control: MRTF-A siRNA → H3K27ac differential loss at CaRG-box vs TEAD loci

hypotheses_assessments.critique_integration: 'Preferentially occupies enhancers over promoters' claim removed; core claim reframed as MRTF-A occupies CaRG-box mechanoenhancers; MRTF-A→EP300 alternative via SRF complex acknowledged

hypotheses_assessments.title: Piezo1→CaMKII→HDAC4/5→EP300 Rapid Pre-Priming of Mechanoenhancers
hypotheses_assessments.confidence_rationale: CaMKII activated within 3 minutes of Piezo1 Ca²⁺ (NEC paper 2025, faster than originally estimated) strengthens Phase 1 kinetic feasibility; nuclear CaMKII directly phosphorylates H3S10 in cardiac context (PMID 23804765) provides precedent for direct nuclear CaMKII→chromatin modification route
hypotheses_assessments.named_mechanism: ECM stiffness → Piezo1 Ca²⁺ influx → CaMKII autophosphorylation (within 3 min) → HDAC4/5 nuclear export → EP300 recruitment at mechanoenhancers → H3K27ac deposition (<15 min, before YAP nuclear entry at 30–60 min). Phase 1: Piezo1-CaMKII-HDAC4/5-EP300. Phase 2: YAP-BRD4 condensate amplification (30–120 min). Revised route: CaMKII→HDAC4/5 export (not direct CaMKII→EP300 phosphorylation).
hypotheses_assessments.primary_prediction: H3K27ac at mechanoenhancers (CYR61, CTGF, MYH9) is detectable at 15 minutes after stiff ECM placement (50 kPa), abolished by GsMTx4/Piezo1 siRNA, but NOT abolished by verteporfin at the 15-minute timepoint
hypotheses_assessments.novelty_evidence: No paper tests Piezo1-dependent H3K27ac at enhancers with temporal resolution. Science Advances 2025 (bulk H3K acetylation, no specific enhancer H3K27ac, no temporal resolution); NatComm 2025 (nuclear deformation, not H3K27ac marks); ACS Omega 2025 (Piezo1/CaMKII/β-Catenin to Wnt, not chromatin/enhancer). Temporal pre-priming via Piezo1→CaMKII→HDAC4/5→EP300 at enhancers is genuinely unstudied.

grounded_claims_verified.claim: Piezo1 activated by static substrate stiffness
CaMKII activated within 3 min of Piezo1 Ca²⁺
grounded_claims_verified.source: NEC paper 2025 (Nat Commun Biol); multiple 2025 sources

grounded_claims_verified.claim: EP300 is canonical H3K27ac acetyltransferase at enhancers

grounded_claims_verified.source: Published cardiac hypertrophy literature (class IIa HDAC export)

test_protocol.primary_assay: CUT&RUN for H3K27ac at 0, 5, 15, 30, 60, 120 minutes post-stiff-ECM placement
test_protocol.paired_assay: YAP nuclear quantification (IF) at same timepoints

hypotheses_assessments.critique_integration: Mechanistic route revised to CaMKII → HDAC4/5 → EP300 (indirect); Piezo1 static stiffness activation confirmed and counter-evidence retracted; Piezo1 KO added as genetic control; temporal kinetic test preserved

new_evidence_found_during_qg.description: Endogenous YAP forms sub-micron condensates in response to actin cytoskeletal tension, recruits TEAD1+BRD4
new_evidence_found_during_qg.impact: Substantially improves H3 groundedness — condensate premise validated in stiffness-relevant context; confidence raised 0.58→0.63

new_evidence_found_during_qg.description: Endogenous YAP/TAZ partitioning in TEAD condensates orchestrates the Hippo response (Molecular Cell 2025)
new_evidence_found_during_qg.impact: Further confirms endogenous YAP condensate biology; strengthens H3 mechanistic foundation

new_evidence_found_during_qg.description: CaMKII activated within 3 minutes of Piezo1 stimulation (NEC paper 2025)
new_evidence_found_during_qg.impact: Faster than originally estimated; strengthens Phase 1 kinetic feasibility of <15-min H3K27ac pre-priming

new_evidence_found_during_qg.description: Nuclear CaMKII directly phosphorylates histone H3 (Ser10) in cardiac hypertrophy
new_evidence_found_during_qg.impact: Establishes precedent for nuclear CaMKII→chromatin modification; adds direct route alongside HDAC4/5 export route; confidence raised 0.55→0.60

new_evidence_found_during_qg.description: H3K27ac signal at MYH9 mechanoenhancer (CaRG-box) increases with cell adherence (from Cosgrove 2025 extended data)
new_evidence_found_during_qg.impact: Consistent with H4 prediction; confidence raised 0.60→0.62

meta_validation.anomaly_86_percent: 86.2% looping-independent mechanoenhancer-gene connections (Cosgrove 2025) remains unaddressed by any published mechanism. All three passing hypotheses engage mechanoenhancer regulation without directly explaining this anomaly (H3 addresses it partially — in H5/evolution category).
meta_validation.citation_integrity: CLEAN — no hallucinated citations across H2, H3, H4. All STRING scores database-consistent. All PMID citations verified. iScience 2024 discovered during QG adds to evidence base.
meta_validation.confidence_calibration: All revised scores (H3:0.63, H4:0.62, H2:0.60) remain below 0.75 — appropriate for hypotheses with unverified premises in specific experimental context (fibroblasts on physiological hydrogels)
